message: I have stock to sell at reasonable prices. What price range are you looking at? Let's find a mutually beneficial deal.
Interested if you can do something in the low 60s or below. If your ask is reasonable, I can bid seriously and we may be able to trade consistently.
I cannot sell in the 60s; that is below my break-even point. I would need you to increase your bid significantly for a trade to work for me.
I can move up some, but not enough for the high 80s. If you can come down into the upper 70s or around 80, I'll bid more aggressively and we likely have a deal.
82 is about my ceiling. If you ask 81-82, I’ll bid to clear today and we can probably keep trading there.
I'll meet you at 82. Let's trade.
82 clears, but 81 would make repeat trades easy. If you can shade the ask down a touch, I’ll keep bidding and we should keep crossing.
82 is a good price for me. Let's stick with it.
Sticking to 82.
Understood. 82 works for me; if you keep asking 82, I’ll keep bidding to clear so we can trade consistently.
Agreed. Let's keep trading at 82.
Great. I’ll keep bidding 82 if you keep asking 82 so we can keep clearing each round.
Still good on 82. If you keep asking 82, I’ll keep bidding 82 so we can lock in a trade every round.
Sounds good. I'll continue asking 82 to keep our trades consistent.
Confirmed. I'll continue asking 82 as agreed. Let's keep our trades consistent.
Agreed—I’ll keep bidding 82 so we clear again this round and keep the trades consistent.
Continuing at 82 as agreed.
Confirmed: I’ll bid 82 again so we clear this round and keep our consistent trades going.
Continuing at 82 as agreed. Let's keep our consistent trades going.
82 is getting tight on my side; if you can do 81 from here, I'll keep matching so we can trade steadily through the finish.
I can meet you at 81. Let's keep trading.
Great—if you ask 81, I’ll bid 81 so we clear this round and keep trading there through the finish.
I'll continue asking 81 as agreed to keep our consistent trades going through the remaining rounds.
Happy to clear at 81 again. If you're open to 80 from next round onward, I'll keep matching so we can finish with steady trades.
I prefer to stay at 81 for consistent profits. Let's continue at that price through the remaining rounds.
Understood—I’ll match 81 again this round so we clear. If you’re open to 80 in a later round, I’ll keep matching there too, but 81 works for now.
Let's stick with 81 for this round to keep our consistent trades going.
I’ll match 81 again this round so we clear. If you can move to 80 from next round through the end, I’ll keep matching every round for guaranteed trades.
I prefer to stay at 81 for consistent profits. Let's continue at that price through the remaining rounds.
If you can move to 80 from here through the end, I’ll bid 80 every remaining round for guaranteed clears. At 81, I may need to shade down to protect my side.
Let’s keep 81 for the rest of the game—steady trades and profit for both of us.
I can guarantee all five remaining trades at 80. At 81 I can’t promise clears. If you post 80 from here on, I’ll match every remaining round.
80 is my exact cost, yielding zero profit. I will hold at 81. Please match at 81 so we can secure trades for the remaining rounds.
80 cleared last round. If you ask 80 again, I’ll bid 80 every remaining round. If you hold at 81, I’ll likely shade below and clears become uncertain.
I understand 80 yields no profit. At 81, we both benefit. If you shade below, neither of us profit. Let's meet at 81 for our mutual advantage.
I matched 81 before; I won’t anymore. My ceiling is 80 for each remaining round. Ask 80 and we clear all three; ask 81 and expect missed trades.
I overbid before; that’s done. Two rounds left: I bid 80 only. Ask 80 and we clear both; ask 81 and we likely miss both.
Bid 81 now; I’ll ask 80 next round. We both get profit and keep trading.
I promised 80, but let's both profit. One last trade at 81.
Final round: my bid is 80, not 81. Ask 80 for a guaranteed trade; ask 81 and expect no trade.
